steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Toss the sausage, shredded cabbage, sliced carrot and cubed pumpkin with the garlic, onion and olive oil, season generously with salt and pepper, and spread out in a single layer on a baking tray.
Roast for 30-40 min, turning the pieces once halfway through, until golden and cooked through. Stir in the kale and salad leaves for the last 5 min of roasting.

name: Karitsasaltimbocca
steps: Add the ham and lamb and cook over medium heat for 8-12 min, stirring occasionally, until cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste and serve hot.

name: Possu-souvlaki
steps: Sauté the minced garlic in a pan over medium heat for 2 min until fragrant.
Add the pork, sliced cucumber and sliced pepper and cook over medium heat for 8-12 min, stirring occasionally, until cooked through.
Stir in the paprika, parsley, yogurt and lemon, season with salt and pepper, and serve hot.

name: Kaali-makkarapannu
steps: Preheat the oven to 200°C.
Toss the sausage and shredded cabbage with the garlic, onion and olive oil and paprika and parsley, season generously with salt and pepper, and spread out in a single layer on a baking tray.
Roast for 30-40 min, turning the pieces once halfway through, until golden and cooked through.
Finish with the cream and serve hot.
